# DeviceActivityData.Error.unauthorized

**Case**

An error indicating the app isn’t authorized to provide parental controls and access data.

## Declaration

```swift
case unauthorized
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/FamilyControls/AuthorizationCenter] for more details.

## Representing errors

- **DeviceActivityData.Error.unavailable**: An error indicating data access is unavailable.
- **DeviceActivityData.Error.missingData**: An error indicating the requested data does not exist.
